parameters.text: ={{ 'Research "' + $('BBR Trigger').first().json.bbrAccount + '" for a Backstory Business Review using People.ai tools. Use get_account_status then ask_sales_ai_about_account. Return ONLY a valid JSON object with: accountName, engagementScore, engagementTrend, opportunities (array: name/amount/stage/closeDate), keyContacts (array: name/title/lastActivity), wins (array of strings), gaps (array of strings), whyBackstory (array of 3 strings), enablementTimeline (array of 3-5 strings), stats (array of up to 4: value/label/change), actionItems (array: action/owner/targetDate).' }}

options.systemMessage: You are a data research assistant. Your ONLY job is to gather account data from People.ai tools and return it as a single valid JSON object with no surrounding text or markdown. Call get_account_status first, then ask_sales_ai_about_account. Return the raw JSON object only.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ channel: $('BBR Trigger').first().json.channelId, ts: $('BBR Trigger').first().json.thinkingTs, text: $('BBR Trigger').first().json.assistantEmoji + ' Your *BBR for ' + $('Parse BBR Data').first().json.accountName + '* is ready!\n\n<https://docs.google.com/presentation/d/' + $('Build BBR Slides').first().json.presentationId + '/edit|\u{1F4CA} Open BBR in Google Slides>', unfurl_links: false }) }}
